title: The Grug Pumpkin
body:
The Grug Pumpkin Mod is a mod that⁽ᶠᵒʳ ⁿᵒʷ⁾only adds The Grug Pumpkin. It is a block and it acts like a block

**A few notes before you install**
- You **MUST** use Fabric API to experience The Grug Pumpkin
- **ONLY** works for 1.20
- The Grug Pumpkin doesn't appear in the Creative Tabs, but it does have a crafting recipe (a pumpkin surrounded by 4 stones) and you can also use the /give command to obtain it as well
